title: Sample Cleanup for Covaris Samples in Library Prep
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and...
steps.instruction: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and P300 pipettes to perform bead-based sample cleanup steps on 48-96 input samples. User-determined parameters are available for selection of the labware for the 96-well PCR plate on the magnetic module, the sample volume, and the bead ratio. ---

steps.title: Before running this protocol with custom...
steps.instruction: Before running this protocol with custom labware on the magnetic module, an engage height for this labware must be entered as a parameter value below.

steps.title: The protocol will alert the user...
steps.instruction: The protocol will alert the user to ensure beads, TE and ethanol are present on deck in sufficient volume.

steps.title: The p300 multi will deliver beads...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will deliver beads to the magnetic module plate and mix.

steps.title: After an incubation and magnet engagement,...
steps.instruction: After an incubation and magnet engagement, the p300 multi will remove and discard bead pellet supernatants.

steps.title: The p300 multi will perform two...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will perform two 80 percent ethanol washes of the bead pellets.

steps.title: After air drying of bead pellets,...
steps.instruction: After air drying of bead pellets, the p20 multi will resuspend the beads in 1x TE and mix.

steps.title: After an incubation, magnets are engaged
steps.instruction: After an incubation, magnets are engaged.
